titel: The Swedish National Audit Office's report on the Public Employment Service's support for people with disabilities.
html:
This document contains the government's assessment and actions in response to the Swedish National Audit Office's report on the Public Employment Service's support for people with disabilities (RiR 2025:20).

The Swedish National Audit Office's conclusion is that the review reveals inefficiencies in the Public Employment Service's work with this group. The Swedish National Audit Office also assesses that the government's governance has not been sufficiently effective.

The government believes that effective and individualized support from the Public Employment Service is crucial for enabling more people with disabilities who experience reduced work capacity to enter the labor market. The government has identified a number of measures needed to improve support for people with disabilities in the labor market.

The government will continue to monitor the Public Employment Service's work in providing appropriate support to people with disabilities who experience reduced work capacity, and will consider the need for further measures. The Swedish National Audit Office's review provides a valuable contribution to this work.

With this document, the government considers the Swedish National Audit Office's report to be finalized.
tldr: The government plans to improve support for people with disabilities, following criticism from the Swedish National Audit Office regarding the Public Employment Service's (Arbetsförmedlingen) performance. The goal is to make it easier for more people to find employment.
lattlast:
The Swedish National Audit Office is an agency that ensures the state is doing its job correctly. They have conducted an audit that shows that the Public Employment Service (Arbetsförmedlingen) is not doing enough to help people with disabilities find jobs. They also believe that the government has not managed the agency effectively.

The government believes that it is extremely important that the support provided by the Public Employment Service is tailored to each individual. If the support is effective, more people who have difficulty working due to a disability can enter the workforce and find employment.

Now, the government has reviewed the report and sees that several measures are needed to improve the situation in the labor market. They will continue to monitor how the Public Employment Service operates to see if further changes are needed in the future.

With this document, the government states that it has now completed its review of the National Audit Office's report. They view the report as an important tool for carrying out the work needed to improve the support provided.
